channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Success of Derrick Henry, Saquon Barkley and other NFL running backs may change position's future
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Derrick Henry, Saquon Barkley and Josh Jacobs are the top three leading rushers in the NFL. Every team had a chance to add them in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Geno Auriemma and Chris Dailey on the cusp of an NCAA record for victories at storied UConn
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Rebecca Lobo still has the handwritten letters she received from UConn coaches Geno Auriemma and Chris Dailey 35 years ago when they were recruiting her as one of the top high school players in the country.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rafael Nadal could be headed to retirement after losing opening match at the Davis Cup
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal lost 6-4, 6-4 to Botic van de Zandschulp in the Davis Cup on Tuesday in what may have been the last match of the Spaniard's career.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New era of college football could help other teams replicate Indiana's remarkable rise
item.description: Indiana has made the type of turnaround that had only happened once before at the power-conference level over the last decade. But this new era of college football with unbalanced schedules and loosened transfer restrictions might make such dramatic transformations more common.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Avalanche snap Flyers three-game win streak
item.description: The Flyers (8-9-2) came into this game against the Colorado Avalanche (10-9-0), sitting at fifth in the Metropolitan Division on a three-game win streak, but it came to an end when the Avalanche outplayed the Flyers almost the whole game.
item.dc:creator: Kylie O'Connor, PHL 17

item.title: Jets fire general manager Joe Douglas as woeful season drags on
item.description: The New York Jets' attempt to salvage another season has resulted in another major shakeup with reports indicating Tuesday that general manager Joe Douglas was fired more than halfway through his sixth season with the organization.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pulisic scores twice, US beats Jamaica 4-2 for 5-2 aggregate win in CONCACAF Nations League QF
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Mauricio Pochettino had a message for American players after a 5-2 aggregate win over Jamaica gave the three-time defending champion United States a berth in the CONCACAF Nations League semifinals. “My advice is look after yourself.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Boxing great Evander Holyfield floats trilogy fight with Mike Tyson
item.description: Evander Holyfield floated a trilogy fight with Mike Tyson on social media. However, "Iron Mike" did not appear to be too into the idea after his loss to Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump thinks he can fix golf's mess. He starts by playing golf with PGA Tour commissioner
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump boasted during the campaign he would need about 15 minutes to get a deal done between the PGA Tour and the Saudi investors of LIV Golf. That started with four hours on the golf course with PGA Tour Commissioner Jay Monahan.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shaun White's new halfpipe league to air on NBC, Peacock
item.description: The new action-sports league being launched by Shaun White will air on NBC and stream on Peacock beginning next year.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Leland, sophomore superstar Chrissy Flynn take on NorCal water polo with lessons from Olympic sister Jenna
item.description: Thanks to some tips from a family full of elite water polo players, Leland star Chrissy Flynn is ready to lead the Chargers into the Northern California Division II playoffs
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: 49ers mailbag: Dissecting defensive doom, Shanahan’s fate
item.description: An extensive mailbag ushers the 49ers (5-5) into their Week 12 preparations for Sunday's visit to the Green Bay Packers (7-3).
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Roger Federer tells friend and rival Rafael Nadal that he made him enjoy tennis more
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Roger Federer says Rafael Nadal made him enjoy tennis “even more” during a rivalry that spanned 40 matches over 15 years.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texans poke fun at Cowboys' stadium roof mishap with hilarious social media post after win
item.description: The Houston Texans rubbed in their victory over the Dallas Cowboys by posting a hilarious graphic on X using AT&T Stadium's metal sheet falling from the roof pre-game as inspiration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eric Bischoff hopes pro wrestling companies put more of an emphasis on this aspect of the sport
item.description: Pro wrestling legend Eric Bischoff tells Fox News Digital what companies need to put more of an emphasis on going forward: storytelling.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pirates phenom Paul Skenes wins NL Rookie of the Year after dominant start to MLB career
item.description: Pittsburgh Pirates phenom pitcher Paul Skenes was named NL Rookie of the Year after an incredible start to his MLB career, posting a 1.96 ERA over 23 starts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bronny James has a left heel bruise and is listed as doubtful for the Lakers' next game
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Bronny James has a bruised left heel, and he is listed as doubtful for the Los Angeles Lakers' next game against the Utah Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans; no injuries reported
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — A piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a game against Houston on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Another Lakers legend to receive statue outside arena
item.description: One of the winningest coaches in NBA history will forever be enshrined in downtown Los Angeles when the Lakers unveil the newest statue on Star Plaza outside Crypto.com Arena.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Netflix 'cannot get away with' production issues for NFL games, ex-star Shawne Merriman warns
item.description: Former NFL star linebacker Shawne Merriman weighed in on the massive production issues Netflix experienced during the Jake Paul-Mike Tyson fight.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 37, Cavaliers stay perfect and improve to 14-0 with 144-126 win over Bulls
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 37 points, Darius Garland had 29 and the Cleveland Cavaliers continued one of the best starts in league history, improving to 14-0 with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Collins scores 29, but Jazz fall to Suns, 120-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Jazz got big contributions from John Collins and rookie Kyle Filipowski, but it wasn't enough to slow down the Phoenix Suns Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
